text:
stakeholder_map.document_id: STAKEHOLDER-MAP-001
stakeholder_map.vendor: OptiChain, Inc.
stakeholder_map.procurement_reference: PRQ-2024-0047
stakeholder_map.pipeline_run_scope: AI-assisted vendor onboarding pipeline — all agents and routing operations within a single pipeline run
stakeholder_map.source_references[0]: PRD §4 (Stakeholder Map)
stakeholder_map.source_references[1]: PROC-CLASS-MEMO-0047 (Classification Record)
stakeholder_map.source_references[2]: CC-001 v1.1 §13 (Escalation Ownership)
stakeholder_map.source_references[3]: VSQ-001 v2.1 (Named contacts)
stakeholder_map.source_references[4]: SLACK-EXPORT-001 (Named reviewers)
stakeholder_map.checkoff_agent_note: This file is the primary input for the Checkoff Agent alongside the finalized checklist. It provides the role-to-stakeholder mapping, required approver list, escalation ownership, and routing guidance needed to produce stakeholder-ready next-step documents. The Checkoff Agent may not query any index endpoint — it consumes this file and assembled agent outputs only.

role_title: IT Security
role.role_id: ROLE-IT-SECURITY
role.role_label: IT Security
role.function: Technical risk gatekeeping
role.owns[0]: Vendor risk classification
role.owns[1]: Fast-track eligibility determination
role.owns[2]: ERP integration tier assignment (ISP-001 §12.2)
role.owns[3]: Architecture diagram review
role.owns[4]: Access provisioning review (ISP-001 §6)
role.not_responsible_for[0]: DPA terms or legal review
role.not_responsible_for[1]: Budget approval
role.not_responsible_for[2]: Contract negotiation
role.pipeline_steps_owned[0]: R-02
role.pipeline_steps_owned[1]: R-04
role.escalation_triggers[0]: ERP integration tier unclassified or ambiguous
role.escalation_triggers[1]: Data classification ambiguous (ERP type field unclear)
role.escalation_triggers[2]: Tier 1 source conflict involving IT Security Policy
role.named_individuals[0].name: D. Achterberg
role.named_individuals[0].title: IT Security Reviewer
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[0]: Technical review of OptiChain questionnaire Q2.2
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[1]: Architecture diagram review for ERP tier assignment
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[2]: Formal tier determination under ISP-001 §12.2
role.named_individuals[0].source: SLACK-EXPORT-001 THREAD-01, THREAD-03
role.named_individuals[1].name: K. Whitfield
role.named_individuals[1].title: CISO
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[0]: CISO sign-off required for Class A / T3 approval path
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[1]: Co-sign approval memo with General Counsel
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[2]: Final authority on ERP tier assignment for Tier 2+ integrations
role.named_individuals[1].required_sign_off: True
role.named_individuals[1].sign_off_basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3
role.named_individuals[1].source: ISP-001 v4.2 document owner; CC-001 §13 escalation owner

role_title: Legal / Privacy
role.role_id: ROLE-LEGAL
role.role_label: Legal / Privacy
role.function: Contractual and regulatory compliance
role.owns[0]: DPA requirement determination
role.owns[1]: Contract clause review
role.owns[2]: NDA status confirmation
role.owns[3]: SCC applicability assessment
role.owns[4]: Data subject rights obligations
role.not_responsible_for[0]: Security risk scoring
role.not_responsible_for[1]: Procurement path routing
role.not_responsible_for[2]: Budget approval
role.pipeline_steps_owned[0]: R-03
role.escalation_triggers[0]: DPA required but no executed DPA on record (hard blocker)
role.escalation_triggers[1]: NDA status unconfirmed (ISP-001 §12.1.4)
role.escalation_triggers[2]: Tier 1 source conflict involving DPA Legal Trigger Matrix
role.escalation_triggers[3]: Government or law enforcement data request received by vendor
role.escalation_triggers[4]: Vendor proposes new sub-processor post-DPA execution
role.named_individuals[0].name: R. Lim
role.named_individuals[0].title: Legal Reviewer / Privacy Counsel
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[0]: DPA requirement determination per DPA Legal Trigger Matrix
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[1]: NDA status confirmation in Lichen contract records
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[2]: GDPR Art. 28 DPA drafting and negotiation
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[3]: EU data residency and SCC assessment
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[4]: Flagging NDA PROVISIONAL status per ISP-001 §12.1.4
role.named_individuals[0].source: SLACK-EXPORT-001 THREAD-02, THREAD-03
role.named_individuals[1].name: General Counsel
role.named_individuals[1].title: General Counsel
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[0]: GC sign-off required for Class A / T3 approval path
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[1]: Co-sign approval memo with CISO
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[2]: Final authority on DPA execution and legal blockers
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[3]: Escalation owner for DPA-related blockers
role.named_individuals[1].required_sign_off: True
role.named_individuals[1].sign_off_basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3; CC-001 §13
role.named_individuals[1].source: DPA-MATRIX-001 v1.3 document owner; CC-001 §13 escalation owner

role_title: Procurement
role.role_id: ROLE-PROCUREMENT
role.role_label: Procurement
role.function: Process ownership and vendor relationship management
role.owns[0]: Approval path determination
role.owns[1]: Vendor questionnaire intake and validation
role.owns[2]: Fast-track eligibility confirmation
role.owns[3]: Vendor class and tier assignment
role.owns[4]: Onboarding record documentation
role.owns[5]: Vendor communications (all vendor-facing comms routed through Procurement)
role.not_responsible_for[0]: Security or legal review outcomes
role.not_responsible_for[1]: DPA terms
role.not_responsible_for[2]: ERP tier assignment
role.pipeline_steps_owned[0]: R-01
role.pipeline_steps_owned[1]: R-02
role.pipeline_steps_owned[2]: R-04
role.escalation_triggers[0]: Questionnaire not submitted or incomplete
role.escalation_triggers[1]: Multiple questionnaire versions detected
role.escalation_triggers[2]: NDA unconfirmed (information-exchange hold owner)
role.escalation_triggers[3]: No approval matrix row matches vendor/deal combination
role.named_individuals[0].name: M. Osei
role.named_individuals[0].title: Senior Procurement Manager
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[0]: Questionnaire receipt and intake validation
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[1]: Vendor class and tier assignment (Class A / T3 confirmed)
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[2]: Onboarding record management
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[3]: Routing formal information requests to vendors
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[4]: NDA status logging in onboarding record
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[5]: Overall onboarding status coordination
role.named_individuals[0].source: PROC-CLASS-MEMO-0047; SLACK-EXPORT-001 THREAD-01, THREAD-02, THREAD-03
role.named_individuals[1].name: CPO (Chief Procurement Officer)
role.named_individuals[1].title: Chief Procurement Officer
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[0]: CPO sign-off required for Class A / T3 approval path
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[1]: Fast-track approval authority
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[2]: Escalation owner for questionnaire version conflicts and NDA blockers
role.named_individuals[1].required_sign_off: True
role.named_individuals[1].sign_off_basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3
role.named_individuals[1].source: PROC-MATRIX-001 v2.0; CC-001 §13
role.named_individuals[2].name: Procurement Director
role.named_individuals[2].title: Procurement Director
role.named_individuals[2].responsibilities[0]: Escalation owner when no approval matrix row matches vendor/deal combination
role.named_individuals[2].source: CC-001 §13

role_title: Compliance / Risk
role.role_id: ROLE-COMPLIANCE-RISK
role.role_label: Compliance / Risk
role.function: Regulatory oversight
role.owns[0]: SOC 2 and audit certification review
role.owns[1]: Regulatory flag escalation
role.not_responsible_for[0]: Contract negotiation
role.not_responsible_for[1]: Security risk scoring
role.not_responsible_for[2]: Approval path routing

role_title: Business Owner
role.role_id: ROLE-BUSINESS-OWNER
role.role_label: Business Owner
role.function: Requesting business unit sponsor; provides operational context and required sign-offs
role.owns[0]: Business case for vendor engagement
role.owns[1]: VP / SVP / EVP sign-off per approval path
role.owns[2]: Operational readiness confirmation
role.not_responsible_for[0]: Security, legal, or procurement review outcomes
role.not_responsible_for[1]: DPA terms
role.not_responsible_for[2]: ERP tier assignment
role.pipeline_steps_owned[0]: R-06
role.named_individuals[0].name: P. Horak
role.named_individuals[0].title: VP Operations
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[0]: VP-level business owner sign-off (required for Class A / T3)
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[1]: Internal sponsor for OptiChain engagement
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[2]: Communicating data-exchange hold to ops team
role.named_individuals[0].responsibilities[3]: Liaison between pipeline status and OptiChain sales team
role.named_individuals[0].required_sign_off: True
role.named_individuals[0].sign_off_basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3 (VP + SVP required)
role.named_individuals[0].source: VSQ-001 v2.1 (Lichen Internal Sponsor); PROC-CLASS-MEMO-0047; SLACK-EXPORT-001
role.named_individuals[1].name: SVP Operations
role.named_individuals[1].title: SVP Operations
role.named_individuals[1].responsibilities[0]: SVP-level business owner sign-off (required for Class A / T3)
role.named_individuals[1].required_sign_off: True
role.named_individuals[1].sign_off_basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3 (VP + SVP required)
role.named_individuals[1].source: PROC-CLASS-MEMO-0047; PROC-MATRIX-001 v2.0

approval_title: CISO
approval.approver_role: CISO
approval.named_individual: K. Whitfield
approval.approval_type: CISO Sign-off
approval.basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3
approval.status: PENDING
approval.blocked_by[0]: ERP integration tier unassigned (ISP-001 §12.2)

approval_title: General Counsel
approval.approver_role: General Counsel
approval.named_individual: General Counsel
approval.approval_type: GC Sign-off + DPA execution
approval.basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3; DPA-MATRIX-001 rows A-01, E-01
approval.status: ESCALATED
approval.blocked_by[0]: GDPR Art. 28 DPA not yet executed (hard blocker)

approval_title: CPO
approval.approver_role: CPO
approval.named_individual: CPO
approval.approval_type: CPO Sign-off
approval.basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3
approval.status: PENDING

approval_title: VP Operations
approval.approver_role: VP Operations
approval.named_individual: P. Horak
approval.approval_type: VP Business Owner Sign-off
approval.basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3
approval.status: PENDING
approval.blocked_by[0]: All three blocking items must be resolved first

approval_title: SVP Operations
approval.approver_role: SVP Operations
approval.named_individual: SVP Operations
approval.approval_type: SVP Business Owner Sign-off
approval.basis: PROC-MATRIX-001 §4 Class A / T3
approval.status: PENDING
approval.blocked_by[0]: All three blocking items must be resolved first

escalation_title: ERP integration tier unclassified
escalation.escalation_id: ESC-001
escalation.condition: ERP integration tier unclassified
escalation.evidence_condition: integration_type field UNCLASSIFIED — PENDING REVIEW in VSQ Q2.2
escalation.policy_reference: ISP-001 §12.2
escalation.status: PROVISIONAL
escalation.resolution_owner: IT Security (D. Achterberg / K. Whitfield)
escalation.resolution_action: Request architecture diagram from OptiChain. Assign integration tier within 10 business days.
escalation.downstream_blocked[0]: CISO sign-off
escalation.downstream_blocked[1]: Fast-track determination
escalation.downstream_blocked[2]: Overall COMPLETE status

escalation_title: GDPR Art. 28 DPA not yet executed
escalation.escalation_id: ESC-002
escalation.condition: GDPR Art. 28 DPA not yet executed
escalation.evidence_condition: dpa_status = NOT YET EXECUTED; triggers DPA-MATRIX-001 rows A-01 (EU personal data) and E-01 (system access with personal data)
escalation.policy_reference: DPA-MATRIX-001 rows A-01, E-01; GDPR Art. 28
escalation.status: ESCALATED
escalation.blocker_type: HARD — no data exchange permitted until resolved
escalation.resolution_owner: General Counsel
escalation.resolution_action: Draft and execute GDPR Art. 28 DPA before any EU employee data is exchanged or system access proceeds.
escalation.downstream_blocked[0]: Information exchange
escalation.downstream_blocked[1]: Integration planning
escalation.downstream_blocked[2]: Overall COMPLETE status

escalation_title: NDA execution unconfirmed
escalation.escalation_id: ESC-003
escalation.condition: NDA execution unconfirmed
escalation.evidence_condition: existing_nda_status = PROVISIONAL; draft transmitted 2024-02-19, not countersigned as of 2024-03-04
escalation.policy_reference: ISP-001 §12.1.4
escalation.status: PROVISIONAL
escalation.blocker_type: Information-exchange phase blocked
escalation.resolution_owner: Procurement / Legal (M. Osei / R. Lim)
escalation.resolution_action: Procurement to confirm fully executed NDA with OptiChain's legal counterpart. 'In progress' does not satisfy ISP-001 §12.1.4.
escalation.downstream_blocked[0]: Information exchange
escalation.downstream_blocked[1]: Data sharing
escalation.downstream_blocked[2]: Integration planning

vendor_contact_title: vendor_contact
vendor_contact.name: Jordan Leví
vendor_contact.title: Director of Enterprise Sales
vendor_contact.email: j.levi@optichain.io
vendor_contact.phone: +1 (415) 882-4401
vendor_contact.implementation_manager.name: Sarah Okonkwo
vendor_contact.implementation_manager.email: s.okonkwo@optichain.io
vendor_contact.routing_note: All vendor communications must be routed through Procurement (M. Osei). No domain reviewers or business owners may communicate onboarding status directly to vendor contacts.
